description_long: This is a modern, spacious bungalow with a flat roof and a large, well-maintained lawn surrounding the structure. The building features expansive windows, especially on the rear facade, allowing for ample natural light and views of the backyard. The property includes a driveway with multiple parking spaces, a swimming pool with a curved edge, and several landscaped areas with palm trees and shrubs. Outdoor amenities such as lounge chairs, a patio dining area, and a privacy fence enhance the residential comfort. The exterior is finished in light, neutral tones, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a swimming pool, driveway, and landscaped yard, designed for open, comfortable living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with parked cars, main entrance, and a glimpse of the pool and palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, patio dining area, and the full expanse of the backyard lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large windows, backyard lawn, swimming pool, and outdoor lounge area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible landscaping, shrubs, and a partial view of the pool and patio.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped rear windows
